entry.title: [GRA4][Databases] - CloudDB eu007 incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 23, 02:05 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Databases offer has been resolved.

Start time : 22/03/2026 21:51 UTC
End time : 23/03/2026 02:00 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 22, 22:16 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Databases offer on the CloudDB eu007.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/03/2026 21:51 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some CloudDB are temporarily unavailable. See the list below :
clouddb020.eu007
clouddb022.eu007
clouddb024.eu007
clouddb026.eu007
clouddb027.eu007
clouddb028.eu007
clouddb036.eu007
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data located on the specified CloudDB.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [EU][VoIP] - VoIP Maintenance notification
entry.content:
Mar 21, 00:58 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Mar 20, 22:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 2, 15:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our VoIP offer.

Start time : 20/03/2026 22:00 UTC
End time : 21/03/2026 01:00 UTC
Service impact : The VoIP service may be unavailable during less than 1min.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, our teams are going to upgrade a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 20, 14:49 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offer has been resolved.

Start time : 18/03/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 20/03/2026 14:45 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 20, 10:41 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The majority of the customers are no longer impacted by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are still working on the last impacted MX Plan mailboxes.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 20, 09:34 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on MX Plan.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 18/03/2026 23:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The MX Plan service is temporarily unavailable for some customers.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their MX Plan mailboxes.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 19, 08:06 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering on MX Plan, which is causing temporary availability issue in the GLOBAL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 18/03/2026 23:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The MX Plan service is temporarily unavailable for some customers.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their MX Plan mailboxes.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][VoIP] - Softcall Incident Notification
entry.content:
Mar 19, 08:48 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our VoIP Softcall has been resolved.

Start time : 18/03/2026 15:00 UTC
End time : 18/03/2026 15:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 18, 16:10 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 18/03/2026 15:30 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 18/03/2026 15:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Instances of lost registration were observed on the softcall service.
Customers Impact : Some users experienced interruptions in softcall service due to lost registration.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 18, 15:24 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our VoIP Softcall offer.

Start time : 18/03/2026 15:00 UTC

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MXPlan incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 17, 02:27 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions has been resolved.

Start time : 16/03/2026 15:02 UTC
End time : 17/03/2026 02:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 16, 17:03 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the event that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : During the migration, the emails sent or received will be stored and delivered once the operation has been completed.
Root Cause : This event is caused by this maintenance : https://web-cloud.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/yczrbvxf8p36
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 16, 15:51 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 16/03/2026 15:02 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Access to mailboxes and webmail is unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are currently unable to access their mailboxes, which means they cannot read, send, or manage their emails.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [Web Cloud][Collaborative solutions - MX Plan] - Microsoft Mailbox Delivery Issue
entry.content:
Mar 11, 10:43 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offer has been resolved.

Start time : 13/02/2026 15:00 UTC
End time : 10/03/2026 17:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 6, 09:01 UTC
Update - We have received updated information regarding the incident affecting your service(s).

Part of the mailbox delivery service is now restored.

Ongoing Actions : The provider has identified the root cause of the issue and is currently working on implementing a fix to fully restore and stabilize the service.

We will keep you informed of any progress and the final resolution.

We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience and understanding.

Mar 2, 17:23 UTC
Identified - We have received updated information regarding the incident affecting your service(s).

Part of the mailbox delivery service is now restored.

Ongoing Actions : The provider is continuing to work on this issue to ensure long-term service stability.

We will keep you informed of any progress and the final resolution.

We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience and understanding.

Feb 26, 14:01 UTC
Investigating - We have received updated information regarding the incident affecting your service(s).

Part of the mailbox delivery service is now restored.

Ongoing Actions : The provider continues to investigate the issue to ensure long-term service stability.

We will keep you informed of any progress and the final resolution.

We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience and understanding.

Feb 23, 16:04 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 23/02/2026 15:50 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/02/2026 15:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Mailbox delivery
Customers Impact : Emails sent to Microsoft‑managed services (Outlook.com, Hotmail, Live, Office 365/Exchange Online) are being delayed, rejected, or not delivered. Deliveries to other providers (e.g., Gmail, Orange) remain unaffected.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 19, 14:58 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering, which is causing temporary functionality issue in the MX Plan solution.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/02/2026 15:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Mailbox delivery
Customers Impact : Emails sent to Microsoft‑managed services (Outlook.com, Hotmail, Live, Office 365/Exchange Online) are being delayed, rejected, or not delivered. Deliveries to other providers (e.g., Gmail, Orange) remain unaffected.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 19, 14:20 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Collaborative solutions offer.

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - Webmail filerz41 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Mar 9, 16:05 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions on the filerz41 has been resolved.

Start time : 09/03/2026 13:38 UTC
End time : 09/03/2026 14:46 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 9, 15:23 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 09/03/2026 14:24 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/03/2026 13:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The MX Plan service was temporarily unavailable on filerz41.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access webmail through the web interface or desktop client. Emails that were sent or received were temporarily unavailable and would be delivered once the incident had been resolved.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 9, 14:13 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering on filerz41, which is causing temporary issue in the GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/03/2026 13:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The MX Plan service is temporarily unavailable on filerz41.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access webmail via the web interface or desktop client. Emails sent or received are temporarily unavailable and will be delivered once the incident is resolved.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 9, 14:04 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on the filerz41.

Start time : 09/03/2026 13:38 UTC

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MXplan incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 9, 09:29 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions has been resolved.

Start time : 05/03/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 06/03/2026 20:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 5, 05:59 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 05/03/2026 05:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Impacted are only mailboxes what are currently during migration from MXPlan Exchange to Zimbra infrastractures.
Customers Impact : Customers who have not received the end-of-migration email temporarily no longer have access to their mailboxes. Customers who have received the email are no longer impacted.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 6, 12:50 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions has been resolved.

Start time : 05/03/2026 14:34 UTC
End time : 05/03/2026 17:38 UTC
Root Cause : This incident is caused by this maintenance : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/vbqzgzwbl6lx

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 5, 17:44 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 05/03/2026 17:38 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 05/03/2026 14:34 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : We currently have an issue with Zimbra infra and can't process any operation requiring it (creating/modifying/deleting account, domains, aliases, password change and redirections)
Root Cause : This incident is caused by this maintenance : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/vbqzgzwbl6lx
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 5, 15:34 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Zimbra infrastucture.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 05/03/2026 14:34 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : We currently have an issue with Zimbra infra and can't process any operation requiring it (creating/modifying/deleting account, domains, aliases, password change and redirections)
Customers Impact : No issues with sending/receiving emails, and webmail is still working.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - cluster120 Filerz30 maintenant notification
entry.content:
Mar 6, 04:37 UTC

All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

Mar 5, 21:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 5, 18:12 UTC
Update - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance during this time.

Mar 5, 18:03 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 05/03/2026 21:30 UTC
End time : 06/03/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact :We are going to migrate the filerz30 to keep our infrastructure up-to-date and more stable to avoid further downtime. The filerz will have a downtime of 30min during the migration.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will perform a maintenance on Filerz30.

Thank you for your understanding.

Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .CO domains.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

entry.title: [FR/BE][VoIP] - Softcall Incident Notification
entry.content:
Mar 2, 09:23 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our VoIP offering has been resolved.

Start time : 25/02/2026 13:01 UTC
End time : 02/03/2026 09:20 UTC

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 27, 09:37 UTC
Identified - We have received new information regarding the incident that impacted your service(s).

Start time : 25/02/2026 13:01 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Softcall registration is still impacted.
Customers Impact : Customers may encounter registration issues with the Softcall application.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams have scheduled a fix for the night of Saturday to Sunday to stabilize the situation before the final patch.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and thank you for your understanding.

Feb 26, 11:34 UTC
Monitoring - We have received new information regarding the incident that impacted your service(s).

Root cause : The incident was caused by an issue on one of our service providers’ side. We are working closely with them to ensure the situation is fully addressed and to avoid any recurrence.
Ongoing Actions : Our technical teams, in coordination with the provider, continue to investigate the issue to ensure long-term service stability.

We will keep you informed of any further updates.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and thank you for your understanding.

Feb 26, 11:24 UTC
Update - We have received new information regarding the incident that impacted your service(s).

VoIP softcall registration has now been fully restored and is available again.

Ongoing Actions : Our technical teams are actively investigating the issue in order to identify the root cause and ensure service stability.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 26, 09:08 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our VoIP offering, which is causing temporary functionality issue on Softcall application for France and Belgium.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/02/2026 13:01 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Softcall registration is impacted.
Customers Impact : Customers may encounter registration issues with the Softcall application.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Start time : 20/02/2026 08:55 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some customers in clusters 024, may experience difficulties to access their websites.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX4][CDN] - Infrastructure maintenance notification
entry.content:
Feb 20, 00:10 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Feb 19, 22:06 UTC
Update - The current maintenance will take more time than expected.

Feb 19, 14:10 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Feb 19, 14:04 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our CDN infrastructure in RBX2.

Start time : 19/02/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 19/02/2026 23:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our CDN infrastructure.
If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team.

Thank you for your understanding.
